review_text: We were first-time buyers in London - overwhelmed, outbid, and frankly terrified. Advaith Homes found us a flat off-market, below our budget, in six weeks. They held our hands the entire way. Genuinely life-changing.
short_desc: Off-market flat secured 8% below comparable properties

review_text: I've bought six properties through Advaith Homes over three years. Their yield analysis is better than any agent I've used, and the off-market access means I'm not competing against 40 other bidders.
short_desc: 6 investment properties acquired across two cities

review_text: Moving from Singapore, we needed someone to be our eyes on the ground. Sarah viewed 14 properties over two weeks and gave us honest, detailed feedback on each. We bought a brilliant family home in Richmond without a single wasted trip.
short_desc: Completed purchase without the buyer visiting until moving day

review_text: The chain management alone was worth the fee. James kept everything moving when the estate agent went quiet for weeks. We completed on time, below asking, and without the stress I feared.
column8: 000 below asking on a probate sale

review_text: We'd been outbid three times before we found Advaith Homes. They changed our offer strategy completely - we won the next property we went for, at a price we were comfortable with.
short_desc: Won competitive offer on third attempt after strategy change

review_text: Finding a second home in a competitive market without living nearby is a nightmare. Advaith Homes found us exactly what we were looking for within two months, including a property we'd never have found on Rightmove.
